description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named Ankh that runs in the default stage using the runner's default Docker image. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -q scons sqlite3 liballegro5-dev liballegro-acodec5-dev liballegro-audio5-dev liballegro-dialog5-dev liballegro-image5-dev liballegro-physfs5-dev liballegro-ttf5-dev pkg-config. Then have the script execute scons to build the project. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
